entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched on November 25, 2019. Phemex suffered a hot-wallet security incident in January 2025, temporarily suspended deposits and withdrawals, restored withdrawal services in stages, and continued operating afterward.
entity.notes: The launch date is refined from year-level 2019 to 2019-11-25 using Phemex's first-party platform-live announcement. The January 2025 hack, transfer suspension, and February restoration events are already represented in canonical history and are not duplicated here.

expected.summary: Centralized exchange that suffered a hot-wallet security incident in January 2025, temporarily suspended deposits and withdrawals, and later restored withdrawal services. It is modeled as active with major incident events rather than a death-side record.
expected.notes: Official Phemex timeline is the primary source for the incident, suspension, staged restoration, and final February 2025 withdrawal restoration.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched on November 25, 2019. Phemex suffered a hot-wallet security incident in January 2025, temporarily suspended deposits and withdrawals, restored withdrawal services in stages, and continued operating afterward.
changes.notes: The launch date is refined from year-level 2019 to 2019-11-25 using Phemex's first-party platform-live announcement. The January 2025 hack, transfer suspension, and February restoration events are already represented in canonical history and are not duplicated here.

events.title: Phemex trading platform went live
events.description: Phemex announced that its main trading platform went live on November 25, 2019 following a public testnet period.
events.notes: The date follows Phemex's first-party platform-live announcement.

evidence.title: Phemex: Platform net is live
evidence.notes: First-party article stating that the trading platform went live on November 25, 2019.

evidence.title: What is Phemex? Crypto Exchange Overview
evidence.notes: Current first-party overview confirming the 2019 founding and continued exchange services.
